channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: We spoke to three Xbox Game Studio teams about exclusivity, and got two very different answers
item.description: The Coalition believes making Gears of War: E-Day an Xbox exclusive was the best decision, but not all Xbox Game Studios teams are aligned on the approach to console exclusivity.

item.title: How to watch USA vs Australia: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Christian Pulisic & Co. continue FIFA World Cup 2026 journey
item.description: Here's how to watch USA vs Australia for free online and from anywhere as the World Cup 2026 co-hosts continue their Group D campaign against the Socceroos.

item.title: XMP / EXPO : ce réglage gratuit qui booste les performances de votre RAM (et comment l’activer)
item.description: Si vous venez d'acheter un PC, ou n'avez encore effectué aucun véritable réglage dessus, on vous conseille d'en appliquer un essentiel pour profiter au mieux de ses performances. On vous explique ici ce qu'est le profil XMP / EXPO pour votre RAM et comment l'activer.

item.title: Amazon casse les prix ce week-end : voici le TOP 50 des offres à saisir avant le Prime Day
item.description: Amazon est en avance cette année. Déjà que son Prime Day est avancé à juin au lieu de juillet, l'e-commerçant américain se permet en plus de lâcher une tonne d'offres en avant-première. Nous avons fait le tri pour vous !

item.title: Reality check: Could the UK's social media ban lead to VPN restrictions?
item.description: As the British Prime Minister shared plans to ban all under-16s from social media, speculation is mounting as to whether VPNs will be next. While we wait for the government to share further information on this in July, here's how the debate has been unfolding.

item.title: Pourquoi votre facture d’électricité va augmenter au 1er août (et c’est lié à l’hiver doux)
item.description: L'hiver dernier, des températures relativement clémentes ont réduit les besoins de chauffage dans de nombreux foyers. Une bonne nouvelle pour la consommation d'électricité, mais qui aura un effet inattendu sur les factures des consommateurs dans les mois à venir. On vous explique pourquoi.

item.title: Le Wahoo Elemnt Roam 3 est l’alternative idéale aux compteurs GPS de Garmin et il perd 20 %
item.description: Besoin d'un compteur GPS fiable, précis et autonome pour vos sorties vélo sans débourser le prix fort d'un modèle Garmin ? Le Wahoo Fitness Elemnt Roam 3 voit son prix passer de 449,99 euros à seulement 364,99 euros chez Alltricks.

item.title: Meilleurs casques Bluetooth en 2026 : quel modèle choisir ?
item.description: Bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs casques audio Bluetooth parmi tous ceux que nous avons pu tester en 2025 et 2026.

item.title: TF1 débarque sur Netflix : chaînes en direct, replay, pubs… voici tout ce qu’il faut savoir
item.description: Netflix intègre désormais l’intégralité du catalogue de TF1+, ainsi que 5 chaînes en direct du groupe. Toutefois, il faut noter que des publicités seront diffusées, peu importe votre abonnement Netflix. De plus, les contenus TF1 seront limités à du Full HD.

item.title: How to watch Leinster vs Bulls: Live Streams & TV Channels for URC Final 2026
item.description: We'll show you how to watch Leinster vs Bulls live streams from anywhere in the world with a repeat of last year's United Rugby Championship (URC) final.

item.title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
item.description: Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.

item.title: I’m a travel photographer, and this Canon PowerShot is the one compact camera I’m packing for my next city break — plus it's on sale for it's lowest price yet
item.description: Looking for a travel compact camera which actually fits in your pocket? I think the Canon PowerShot V1 has been slept on.

item.title: Flowtica Scribe : le stylo IA qui enregistre vos réunions et les retranscrit
item.description: Pour celles et ceux que la prise de notes en réunion rebute, mais qui aiment écrire de temps en temps quand même, il y a Flowtica Scribe, un stylo IA.

item.title: Microsoft warns AI agents are being 'AutoJack'-ed to deliver RCE payloads by browsing untrusted websites
item.description: Three minor vulnerabilities chained together can cause a lot of trouble but Microsoft fixed it on time.

item.title: Droit de rétraction : annuler son abonnement Canal+ devient beaucoup plus simple
item.description: Conformément au décret entré en vigueur le 19 juin 2026, la résiliation, dans le cadre du droit de rétractation, d'un contrat souscrit en ligne n'est plus un parcours du combattant.

item.title: DaVinci Resolve Studio 21 review: Pro-grade video editing software with some amazing - and terrifying - AI tools
item.description: Blackmagic’s DaVinci Resolve Studio is their top of the line desktop video editor. Are the new tools introduced in version 21 worth your time?

item.title: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
item.description: NTS Radio and Swedish audio company Atonemo have teamed up on a dedicated player that brings NTS's genre-defying mixes and streaming stations to almost any stereo or speaker setup. And, like Atonemo's existing Streamplayer, you can also listen to your favorite streaming services with it, using AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify Connect, or Tidal Connect. […]...

item.title: ‘The best looking discs I’ve ever seen’: I’ve picked the top 10 4K Blu-rays I’ve tested in the last two years — including reference-quality discs I use as part of reviewing TVs
item.description: After nearly two years of the Blu-ray Bounty, I’ve picked my top 10 4K Blu-rays I've tested for my monthly roundups.

item.title: The 5 best gaming deals Id buy before Prime Day — Asus gaming laptops and Samsung monitors on sale
item.description: Save 30% on an Asus gaming laptop and 42% on a Samsung gaming monitor before Prime Day.

item.title: Voici combien pourrait coûter l’iPhone 18 Pro après la hausse des prix d’Apple
item.description: Une analyse du Wall Street Journal et du cabinet TechInsights révèle l'explosion du coût des composants de l'iPhone 18 Pro. Entre la crise de la RAM et un nouveau système photo, le prix de départ pourrait bondir.

item.title: Why cybersecurity needs hybrid AI, not platform consolidation
item.description: Artificial intelligence has transformed enterprise cybersecurity into a machine-speed quickdraw contest.

item.title: Security experts reveal Proton is the 'only VPN' to avoid internal tunnel IP fingerprinting on iOS
item.description: According to a security researcher at Mysk, Proton VPN may be the only app that successfully dodges internal tunnel IP fingerprinting on iOS. But that tells more about Apple than Proton's competitors.

item.title: Circumvention tool or essential security software? The shifting role of VPNs in the UK
item.description: With VPNs under extreme scrutiny, what does the future hold for privacy tools in the UK?

item.title: The Most Promising Ebola Vaccine Has Been Sitting on the Shelf for 15 Years
item.description: Years after initial tests, researchers are now racing to see if a vaccine developed in 2011 can help fight the current Bundibugyo outbreak in Congo.

item.title: Voici une grosse config’ sous une RTX 5070 Ti, Core Ultra 7, 32 Go de RAM et écran QHD+ de 16″ avec 200 € de réduction
item.description: Le Gigabyte Gaming A16 Pro est un laptop gaming costaud capable de tout faire tourner sans rechigner. Grosbill se permet de le faire passer de 2 399,90 euros à 2 199,90 euros.

item.title: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
item.description: Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023 spanning Altman's termination and reinstatement as CEO, had been in the works for about a year. The cast also includes A Complete Unknown actress Monica […]

item.title: ‘Toy Story 5’ taps into white-collar fears of obsolescence in the age of AI
item.description: The Pixar franchise’s latest installment arrives as debates about technology, screen time, and the future of Hollywood itself have never been louder. Before Disneyfication, fairy tales were terrifying, designed to teach kids about dangerous aspects of the world.

item.title: Kroger is giving away 100,000 free pints of ice cream. But you have to act fast
item.description: The grocery giant is celebrating the summer solstice by giving away 100,000 free pints of ice cream, but the offer is only available for a limited time. This Sunday, June 21, is the Summer Solstice in the Northern Hemisphere, which officially marks the first day of summer. To celebrate the arrival of many people’s favorite time of the year, the supermarket giant Kroger is giving away 100,000 free pints of ice cream. But if you want one, you’ll have to act fast today....

item.title: Sugar season 2 dials up the Old Hollywood vibes for a sophisticated Apple TV sequel — but I would've loved more focus on season 1's big twist
item.description: Sugar season 2 is finally here but its slow burn and persistent mysteries may start to frustrate some fans.

item.title: Older iPhones are vulnerable to a flaw Apple likely can’t fix
item.description: A cybersecurity firm discovered an unfixable flaw with some iPhone and Apple device models.
